---
title: "{{< meta course_title >}}"
deck_id: d05
deck_title: "{{< meta decks.d05.title >}}"
deck_short_title: "{{< meta decks.d05.short_title >}}"

include-after-body:
  - text: |
      <script id="deck-nav-meta" type="application/json">
      {
        "deck_prev_file": "{{< meta decks.d04.file >}}",
        "deck_prev_title": "{{< meta decks.d04.title >}}",
        "deck_next_file": "",
        "deck_next_title": ""
      }
      </script>

subtitle: <span class="deck-title">{{< meta decks.d05.title >}}</span>
---

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/statistics/general/data-modeling.qmd >}}

{{< include ../classlib/classlib/quarto/slides/shared/general/presentation-comments-s26.qmd >}}
